creator: aldis@berjoza.lv
text:
Created attachment 157843
patch that fixes sound issues on my system

For quite some time now (few versions) I had no sound coming out of firefox no matter what options I've selected.

Today I finally had enough. So I checked firefox source and found solution that worked (for me at least)

I've attached patch for configure.in. I wanted to submit port update, however I'm not sure how to properly integrate this patch within current patches.




uname -a:
